title: STRUCTURED TRADING
author: elliotthamilton
selftext: i am in a book for algorithmic finance thats very well known, i have a neat project for people if theyre interested in collaboarting on real signals and real test results all the optimzation is handled. you think you got a trading strategy theres no way you can program it on my platform especially with a little ai help. your strategies will be turned into AI models, with a report on how well they performed and how confident you can be to trade it.
